nasb.text: “So then, I thought to myself that I had to do many things hostile to the name of Jesus of Nazareth.

esv.text: “I myself was convinced that I ought to do many things in opposing the name of Jesus of Nazareth.

cnv.text: 從前，我也認為應該多方敵對拿撒勒人耶穌的名。

ccb.text: 我自己也曾经认为应该尽一切可能反对拿撒勒人耶稣。

csbs.text: 事实上，我自己曾经认为必须多做反对拿撒勒人耶稣之名的事，
